prose: The Fukui reactivity prediction on pyridine was performed using the chemkit skill with the following method: DFT at B3LYP/def2-TZVP level, tier 'standard', gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. The result for the Fukui zero component (f0) at the most electrophilic atom (N) is 0.27417. Atom count: 11.
